divergences.claim: canonicalString(fields) serializes a flat string map to the string signatures are computed over. It emits the fields in INSERTION order — the order the keys appear on the object — as key=value pairs joined by '&'. So {b:'2', a:'1', c:'3'} serializes to "b=2&a=1&c=3".
divergences.prose: canonicalString(fields) serializes a flat string map to the string signatures are computed over. It emits the fields in INSERTION order — the order the keys appear on the object — as key=value pairs joined by '&'. So {b:'2', a:'1', c:'3'} serializes to "b=2&a=1&c=3".
